description: Style Note Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. Wranger goes colourful and super trendy with this comfortable top. Pair it with your favourite pair of jeans or a comfortable pair of shorts. Product Details A white checked top with purple and blue vertical and horizontal lines, a spread collar, half buttoned placket, drawstring tie at the hemline, sleeveless with ruffles around the arm holes Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm, inside out, using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleach Do not wring Flat dry in shade inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
